stemHtml: ATC: "D-NB, squawk 5412, climb to altitude 4500 ft". What is the correct reply?

options.a: "Squawk five four one two, climbing to altitude four five zero zero feet, D-NB".
options.b: "Squawk fifty-four twelve, climbing to altitude forty-five hundred feet, D-NB".
options.c: "Squawk five four one two, climbing to altitude four five hundred feet, D-NB".
options.d: "Squawk five four one two, climbing to altitude four thousand five hundred feet, D-NB".
